DEFT'S MTS EVID PER PC1538,5 FILED

/CAL: TRIAL - PRETRIAL MOTIONS/X:PEOPLE'S SUPPLEMENTAL MOTIONS IN LIMINE,AND OPPOSITION TO DEFENSE'S MOTION TO DISMISS REGARDING BRADY VIOLATIONS ARE FILED WITH WITH THE COURT/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO DISMISS FOR PROSECUTORIALMISCONDUCT REGARDING  BRADY V MARYLAND VIOLATION, MOTION IN LIMINE TO EXCLUDE PROPENSITY EVIDENCE, AND MOTION FOR ADDITIONAL TIME FOR VOIR DIRE ARE FILED WITH THE COURT/X:PRE-TRIAL MOTIONS ARE CONDUCTED/ /MO PC 1385:UNABLE TO SUSTAIN THEIR BURDEN OF PROOF/

/CAL: FORTHWITH FROM #17 FOR TRIAL & MTS/X:DA'S ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE MTS IS DENIED/ARG&SUB/ /X: MOTION TO SUPPRESS GRANTED AS TO CERTAIN STATEMENTS MADE BY THE DEFENDANT/X:DEFENDANT AND COUNSEL STIPULATE TO A NEW LAST DAY/LD:01-11-12/ /X:SUBPOENA DOCUMENTS ARE RELEASED TO ADA MS, SACK/X:PEOPLE'S TRIAL BRIEF AND WITNESS LIST ARE FILED WITH THE COURT/X:DEFENDANT'S MOTIONS IN LIMINE AND WITNESS LIST ARE FILED WITH THE COURT/CONTD:TRIAL-PRETRIAL MOTIONS/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/987,2/OR/SA1:LLOYD WILLIAMS JR/SAORD/CTORD:AS CONDITION OF O,R,, DEFENDANT MUST OBEY STAY AWAY/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:TRIAL & MTS/LD:01-09-12/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 25/TRANS 25:FORTHWITH FOR JURY TRIAL AT 1:30PM/
